title: invoke copilot_createFile in Copilot Chat extension
author: Cheng
excerpt:
I'm developing a VS Code Copilot Chat extension and trying to invoke built-in Copilot tools such as copilot_editFile
or copilot_insertEdit
programmatically.
Read-only tools (e.g. copilot_readFile
) work fine, but any attempt to invoke edit/update tools fails. I've tried multiple variations (with/without cancellation tokens, different input formats, etc.), but all attempts to invoke edit/update tools fail (with sample code below).
Questions:
- Is it possible to invoke VS Code's built-in Copilot e
